overview.description: The Columbia Diversified Fixed Income Allocation ETF (DIAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index comprised of six sub-indexes, each representing a different sector within the fixed income space. The index allocates fixed weights to each of the six sectors. DIAL was launched on Oct 12, 2017 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
